title: Aggarwal Women Law College Ballabgarh Recruitment 2026, Notfication Out , Apply Now -

vacancy_details.eligibility: Master’s Degree in Library Science (M.Lib) with NET/Ph.D.
12th Pass or Diploma/Certificate in Library Science
BCA / B.Sc (IT) / Graduation with PGDCA/O Level Certificate
BCA / Diploma or B.Tech in Computer Science / IT

how_to_apply: Download the Form: visit the official website https://aggarwalcollegeoflaw.ac.in/ Fill the form in BLOCK CAPITAL letters carefully, and provide accurate personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include Self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, Fee Receipt , and age proof (Aadhar, PAN, etc.). Also, attach a self-addressed envelope of size 25 cm x 10 cm. The envelope containing the application should be superscribed as “Application for the post of ___________________”. Send Application Form: “O/o Aggarwal College of Law (Women), Ballabgarh near Ambedkar Chowk, Tigaon Road Ballabgarh, Distt. Faridabad, Haryana-121004.” A copy of the application form must be sent to “The Dean, College Development Council, M.D. University, Rohtak-124001″. Aggarwal Women Law College Ballabgarh Recruitment 2026
